name: OmopEthnicityCodes
title: OMOP Ethnicity-vocabulary codes (top-level, used in person.ethnicity_concept_id)
description: The two Standard concepts that may land in `person.ethnicity_concept_id`: 38003563 (Hispanic or Latino) and 38003564 (Not Hispanic or Latino). Athena's Ethnicity vocab is flat — the other 148 rows are detail entries ('Mexican', 'Argentinean', etc.) that aren't aggregated above into a hierarchy; OMOP `person.ethnicity_concept_id` takes a single concept and by convention that's one of these two. Use 0 (no matching concept) when ethnicity is unknown or absent.

extension.valueString: SELECT concept_id::text AS code, concept_name AS display FROM vocab.concept WHERE vocabulary_id = 'Ethnicity' AND standard_concept = 'S' AND concept_class_id = 'Ethnicity' AND concept_id IN (38003563, 38003564)
